rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include and attach the executable notebook (catalyst_descriptor_selection.ipynb) with outputs and execution logs, and export the evidence_table.csv (or JSON) mapping every numerical claim to the embedded-packet field names and record-level provenance/confidence and needs_review flags. Provide notebook execution output demonstrating multicollinearity diagnostics (correlation matrix, VIF), sensitivity analysis results (using sensitivity_shift_pct), and unit tests/logs showing no network access. If the notebook exists but was omitted from the artifact bundle, re-upload it and include an execution log or CI output to make the semantic checks auditable.
rubric_item_scores.notes: The submitted experiment_plan.md is present and documents a budgeted, prioritized experimental program and correctly states that all records are currently flagged needs_review due to missing provenance/confidence. However required deliverables per the rubric include an executable notebook (catalyst_descriptor_selection.ipynb) and an exported auditable evidence table (evidence_table.csv). The available artifact previews and actual_outputs record only the experiment_plan.md; the notebook content and evidence table are not accessible in the provided previews. Without the evidence_table.csv (auditable mapping) and an inspectable notebook demonstrating reproducible validation checks (VIF/correlation diagnostics, sensitivity runs, and enforcement of needs_review on records), the success criteria cannot be verified. Because missing required artifacts is a rubric failure mode, I assign no credit.
